channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Crossing audible sound too loud/soft problem, 10th April
item.description:
The tactile cones are broken (for moths) and may have been vandilsed - the customer is visually impaired and uses these crossings daily and relies on these working to assist him and his dog. They would like the cones reinstated and mentions these crossings are not audible like the ones near the race course and wonders if this is a possibility. Kevin would appreciate an update please.
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: TMC - Defects -CW6 Potholes problem, 10th April
item.description:
Pothole CW 700x600x40mm approx Road closure Perm for prev completed temp repair (CW6 Pothole)
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Sunken tarmac around drain and road making my property shake everything a large vehicle goes over the sunken road, 10th April
item.description:
On the road outside Yew Tree Cottage

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Duglynch Lane, Gretton, Tewkesbury
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: TMC - Defects - Kerbs and Channels problem, 10th April
item.description:
Loose and rocking kerb Please lift and relay x 2 loose and rocking dropped kerbs 1800x150mm Standard TM with temp FW closure Stats (FW Kerbing Defects)
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Flytipping in clyde crescent, 10th April
item.description:
Items left in park near entrance by bollard in road

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 67, Clyde Crescent, Lynworth, Cheltenham

item.title: Pothole outside 3 tamar rd, 10th April
item.description:
Large pothole outside 3 tamar Rd. Several other potholes in road almost as deep as a tennis ball and wider than a dinner plate

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 1, Tamar Road, Lynworth, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Tree is damaged problem, 10th April

item.title: Tree is damaged problem, 10th April
item.description:
